channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Netflix drops bid for Warner Bros, clearing way for Paramount takeover - BBC
item.description:
1. Netflix drops bid for Warner Bros, clearing way for Paramount takeover  BBC

  4. Netflix ditches deal for Warner Bros. Discovery after Paramount’s offer is deemed superior  CNBC

item.title: Fintech company Block lays off 4,000 of its 10,000 staff, citing gains from AI - AP News
item.description:
1. Fintech company Block lays off 4,000 of its 10,000 staff, citing gains from AI  AP News

  3. I'm a data analyst who survived 3 rounds of layoffs at Block. I saw how AI was automating my work — it cost me my job.  Business Insider
  4. Block shares soar 24% as company slashes workforce by nearly half  CNBC
  5. Jack Dorsey lays off 4,000, says others will do same 'within the next year'  SFGATE
